cases.prompt: What's my current cash position across all accounts, and which accounts are driving the biggest balance changes this month?
cases.notes: Needs account balances plus cashflow trend analysis.

cases.prompt: Refresh my connected accounts and then tell me if anything failed to sync or looks stale.
cases.notes: Edge case: requires forcing a sync before checking account status.

cases.prompt: Can you summarize spending by category for the last 30 days and flag any unusual spikes?
cases.notes: Needs transaction detail and category mapping.

cases.prompt: Show me how much we spent on travel, meals, and software this quarter, and compare it to the budget.
cases.notes: Requires budget data plus categorized transactions.

cases.prompt: Which budget categories are over or near limit this month, and what are the main transactions causing it?
cases.notes: Budget variance analysis with transaction attribution.

cases.prompt: Build a simple cashflow forecast for the next two weeks using my recent transaction patterns.
cases.notes: Uses historical transactions and code for projection.

cases.prompt: Export a table of all transactions over $500 from the last 60 days, grouped by category and merchant.
cases.notes: Requires filtering, grouping, and formatting.

cases.prompt: I think a payment posted twice yesterday. Check recent transactions and tell me if there are duplicates.
cases.notes: Edge case: duplicate detection from raw transaction data.

cases.prompt: What are my current budgets, and which categories have no transactions yet this month?
cases.notes: Combines budget list with absence-of-activity check.

cases.prompt: Show me all accounts with negative balances or overdraft risk, and explain whether cashflow suggests this is temporary.
cases.notes: Needs balance inspection and cashflow context.

cases.prompt: I need a month-end finance snapshot: total balances, spending by category, budget status, and cashflow summary.
cases.notes: Broad multi-tool financial summary.

cases.prompt: Find every transaction labeled as 'uncategorized' or missing a category, then estimate how much of monthly spending is still unclassified.
cases.notes: Edge case: uncategorized classification and aggregation.

cases.prompt: Tell Jordan I’m running 10 minutes late to the board meeting and ask if we can push my slot to the end.
cases.notes: Simple outbound message with scheduling context.

cases.prompt: Text Maya and the finance team: I approved the revised budget, but please hold the vendor payment until legal signs off.
cases.notes: Group communication with a finance-related instruction.

cases.prompt: Call or message the recruiter and tell them I’m interested, but I need the interview moved from Thursday to next week.
cases.notes: Requires outreach and rescheduling via messaging.

cases.prompt: Send a quick update to the ops channel: the deployment is delayed, the cause is known, and I’ll share an ETA in 30 minutes.
cases.notes: Internal status update to a team channel.

cases.prompt: Please message Priya and ask her to resend the latest contract draft, since the attachment in the last email was corrupted.
cases.notes: Follow-up request with a specific reason.

cases.prompt: Set a recurring reminder text to me every Friday at 4 PM: review cash flow, runway, and overdue invoices.
cases.notes: Needs messaging plus scheduled recurrence.

cases.prompt: Send an apology to Alex: I missed the call because of a travel delay, and I’d like to reconnect tomorrow morning if possible.
cases.notes: Personal apology and re-engagement.

cases.prompt: Notify the team that I’m in a no-signal area for the next two hours, so urgent issues should go through Sarah.
cases.notes: Availability notice with escalation path.

cases.prompt: Draft and send a concise thank-you message to the investor after the meeting, but don’t mention the fundraising timeline yet.
cases.notes: Polite outbound message with content constraint.

cases.prompt: Every Monday at 8 AM, send me a message with the top three priorities for the week and a reminder to check my calendar.
cases.notes: Scheduled recurring self-message.

cases.prompt: Find the latest SEC filing and recent news on Stripe’s valuation changes this quarter.
cases.notes: Needs current web search plus fetching source pages.

cases.prompt: Pull the most recent X posts from Sam Altman about AI regulation and summarize the themes.
cases.notes: Social media lookup on X only.

cases.prompt: Compare three AI coding tools for startup use and give me a recommendation with a quick table.
cases.notes: Requires current product research and lightweight analysis.

cases.prompt: Read this PDF investor memo and extract the key financial assumptions, risks, and next steps.
cases.notes: Document extraction from a PDF.

cases.prompt: I need a quick market scan: what are competitors saying about pricing changes in the enterprise AI space?
cases.notes: Broad web research across multiple sources.

cases.prompt: Search X for reactions to the latest OpenAI release and summarize sentiment from founders and engineers.
cases.notes: X-only sentiment scan.

cases.prompt: Can you analyze this CSV of monthly burn and runway, then tell me whether we should cut spend?
cases.notes: Data analysis requires code execution.

cases.prompt: Find the original source for this claim about GPU shortages, then verify whether it’s still true today.
cases.notes: Source tracing and verification.

cases.prompt: I pasted a long PDF of a legal contract—extract all clauses mentioning termination, renewal, and exclusivity.
cases.notes: Structured extraction from a PDF.

cases.prompt: Research whether the new FTC guidance affects our planned data-sharing workflow, and cite primary sources.
cases.notes: Primary-source policy research.

cases.prompt: Launch parallel research on three cloud providers’ enterprise AI offerings and return a concise comparison.
cases.notes: Parallel sub-research requires session orchestration.

cases.prompt: Use subagents to gather independent summaries of the top five competitors in our space, then merge them.
cases.notes: Explicit multi-agent research workflow.

cases.prompt: Check the latest web sources on the EU AI Act, then cross-check against commentary on X for startup impact.
cases.notes: Combines web and X research.

cases.prompt: I need the latest benchmarks on GPT-4.1 vs Claude vs Gemini, and a small script to normalize the scores.
cases.notes: Research plus simple computation.

cases.prompt: Review this research paper PDF and tell me whether its methodology is sound enough to inform product decisions.
cases.notes: Document review and evaluation.

cases.prompt: Create a polished hero image for our CEO’s LinkedIn post announcing the new funding round. Use our brand colors, include a subtle upward growth motif, and make it look premium and trustworthy.
cases.notes: Needs a generated marketing visual.

cases.prompt: Turn this product launch script into a 45-second voiceover in a calm, confident startup-announcer style. Make it sound natural, not robotic, and suitable for a demo video.
cases.notes: Requires text-to-speech for narration.

cases.prompt: Make a short animated teaser for our new mobile app: sleek UI shots, fast cuts, subtle motion graphics, and a final call-to-action. Keep it under 20 seconds.
cases.notes: Needs generated video content.

cases.prompt: Review this screenshot of the dashboard and tell me whether the spacing, typography, and color contrast feel premium enough for a board presentation.
cases.notes: Requires image understanding of an uploaded screenshot.

cases.prompt: Fetch the latest design trends for startup landing pages in 2026, then summarize what visual style would best fit a high-trust fintech brand.
cases.notes: Needs current web research.

cases.prompt: Generate a clean cover image for our internal podcast episode on founder burnout. It should feel empathetic, modern, and not overly corporate.
cases.notes: Requires custom cover art.

cases.prompt: Create a 30-second product explainer video from this concept: a founder uses our platform to automate weekly reporting and save time. Make it visually engaging and easy to understand.
cases.notes: Needs generated explainer video.

cases.prompt: Convert this customer testimonial into a warm, natural-sounding spoken clip for social media. Keep the pacing upbeat and remove any awkward pauses.
cases.notes: Requires voice rendering of text.

cases.prompt: Analyze this mockup and tell me if the layout would work for a mobile-first investor update. Focus on readability, hierarchy, and whether the main message lands instantly.
cases.notes: Requires visual analysis of a mockup.

cases.prompt: Look up a few examples of high-performing SaaS launch videos and summarize the common creative patterns we should copy for our own campaign.
cases.notes: Needs current examples from the web.

cases.prompt: Check the latest SEC filing for Stripe and summarize any new risks or revenue changes relevant to a possible partnership.
cases.notes: Needs live web lookup plus page retrieval for recent filing details.

cases.prompt: Find three current competitors to our startup in the AI scheduling space and compare their pricing pages.
cases.notes: Requires browsing current websites and fetching pricing content.

cases.prompt: Look up the venue website and confirm whether the conference has ADA-accessible seating and a public transit option.
cases.notes: Needs live venue info from website pages.

cases.prompt: Search for the latest documentation on the OpenAI API rate limits and extract the exact limits for paid accounts.
cases.notes: Requires current docs and precise text extraction.

cases.prompt: Find a recent news article about our biggest competitor’s funding round and tell me the amount and investors.
cases.notes: Needs current news search and article retrieval.

cases.prompt: Browse LinkedIn and the company site to verify whether the new CTO at Acme is the same person mentioned in the press release.
cases.notes: Cross-checking identities across live web sources.

cases.prompt: I uploaded a screenshot of a dashboard error. Read it and tell me what the error message says, then find the relevant docs.
cases.notes: Requires image interpretation plus web lookup for docs.

cases.prompt: Compare the latest iPhone and Pixel product pages and tell me which one has the better battery life claim.
cases.notes: Needs current product page comparison and extraction of claims.

cases.prompt: Move my 3:00 PM with Priya to tomorrow afternoon and tell her I’m running late.
cases.notes: Reschedule an existing meeting and notify the attendee.

cases.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 8:30 AM to review the board deck, starting next Monday.
cases.notes: Recurring schedule creation with a future start date.

cases.prompt: Can you find a 30-minute slot next week for me and Jordan, then send him the invite once you pick one?
cases.notes: Needs scheduling logic plus outbound communication.

cases.prompt: Cancel my 1-on-1 with Ava on Friday and let her know I’ll reconnect after the product launch.
cases.notes: Cancellation with notification; no new event creation required.

cases.prompt: Schedule a daily check-in for the ops team at 9 AM on weekdays, but skip holidays.
cases.notes: Recurring weekday schedule with exception handling.

cases.prompt: Please remind me in 45 minutes to leave for the airport, and text my driver too.
cases.notes: Timed reminder plus message to a third party.

cases.prompt: Push my dentist appointment back one hour and confirm the new time with the office.
cases.notes: Time adjustment and external confirmation.

cases.prompt: Book me a 15-minute buffer after every investor call this week so I don’t get back-to-back meetings.
cases.notes: Scheduling rule that applies after events across a time range.

cases.prompt: Show me all active support sessions from the last 24 hours and summarize any that were reopened after being closed.
cases.notes: Needs current session inventory plus historical state changes.

cases.prompt: Schedule a recurring 8:30 AM Monday finance review reminder starting next week and ending at the end of Q2.
cases.notes: Requires recurring schedule creation.

cases.prompt: Send the latest weekly ops report to the CEO’s Slack and email, and make sure both messages go out now.
cases.notes: Requires external communications delivery.

cases.prompt: Spin up a coding subagent to investigate why the deployment script failed yesterday and propose a fix.
cases.notes: Needs delegated investigation work.

cases.prompt: List all sessions related to the payroll incident and show their full history, including who resumed each one.
cases.notes: Combines filtering with audit trail.

cases.prompt: At 6 PM every weekday, ping me if any customer escalations are still unresolved.
cases.notes: Recurring conditional reminder requires scheduling.

cases.prompt: Text the facilities vendor to confirm tomorrow’s office maintenance window and ask them to reply if the timing changes.
cases.notes: External message delivery to a third party.

cases.prompt: Create a subagent to review our AWS cost spikes, then have it return the top three likely causes with evidence.
cases.notes: Delegated analysis task.

cases.prompt: Find the session where we discussed the board deck last week, then show every status change from creation to close.
cases.notes: Requires locating a session and auditing its lifecycle.

cases.prompt: Set a one-time reminder for 15 minutes before my 2 PM call, but only if the meeting is still on my calendar.
cases.notes: Edge case: time-based reminder with conditional execution.

cases.prompt: Turn off the office lights, set the thermostat to 72, and lock the front door after everyone leaves.
cases.notes: Needs device control plus a confirmation/status message.

cases.prompt: If the conference room projector is still on, power it down and let me know when it’s done.
cases.notes: Simple remote device action with user notification.

cases.prompt: Start the morning routine: lights to 40%, open the blinds, and play the daily briefing in the kitchen.
cases.notes: Multiple smart-home device actions and completion update.

cases.prompt: The team is complaining the Wi‑Fi is flaky. Reboot the office router if it’s safe, but only after checking whether anyone is in a critical call.
cases.notes: Edge case involving conditional device control and user communication.

cases.prompt: I’m leaving in 5 minutes—arm the security system, close the garage, and make sure the back door sensor reports closed.
cases.notes: Multi-device arming/closing sequence with status confirmation.

cases.prompt: Mute all conference room speakers immediately; we’re hearing feedback during the all-hands.
cases.notes: Urgent single-action device command plus acknowledgement.

cases.prompt: If my laptop is still connected to the dock in the office, safely eject it and power down the dock after 6 PM.
cases.notes: Conditional timing-based device operation.

cases.prompt: Find the nearest available meeting room with a working display, then turn on the screen and set the room to presentation mode.
cases.notes: Requires device/location selection and control, plus a response back to the user.

cases.prompt: Spin up two parallel agents to inspect the payment webhook bug and the dashboard UI regression, then summarize findings in one thread.
cases.notes: Requires parallel investigation and later consolidation.

cases.prompt: List all active coding sessions, identify which one is stalled, and continue only the one touching the billing service.
cases.notes: Needs session discovery before resuming a specific task.

cases.prompt: Create a fresh agent to refactor the auth module, and keep the main session free while it runs.
cases.notes: Requires delegating work to a separate coding agent.

cases.prompt: I have three code review threads running. Show me the session list, then yield the one with the highest-priority hotfix and ignore the rest.
cases.notes: Session selection based on priority.

cases.prompt: Launch a subagent to trace the intermittent test failure, and another to check whether the CI config changed today.
cases.notes: Parallel diagnostics across code and CI.

cases.prompt: Find all open coding sessions, then yield the one working on the API rate limiter. If none exist, spawn a new one.
cases.notes: Edge case: fallback to creating a new session.

cases.prompt: Use a separate agent to compare the old and new implementations of the scheduler, then report only the behavioral differences.
cases.notes: Delegated code comparison.

cases.prompt: Check which sessions are active right now, and hand off the database migration task to the least busy one.
cases.notes: Requires listing sessions before assigning work.

cases.prompt: I need you to debug the flaky onboarding test in parallel with a second agent reviewing the failing stack trace. Merge the conclusions afterward.
cases.notes: Parallel debugging with synthesis.

cases.prompt: Show me every current coding session, then spawn a new agent only if none of them are already investigating the deployment rollback issue.
cases.notes: Conditional session creation based on existing work.

cases.prompt: Draft a concise weekly status update for the CEO based on these notes: fundraising is on track, two hires are in final rounds, and the product launch slipped by one week.
cases.notes: Can be handled entirely with drafting from provided text.

cases.prompt: Summarize the key risks in this meeting transcript and turn them into a bullet list for me to review.
cases.notes: Requires only reading and summarizing supplied content.

cases.prompt: Help me rewrite this email so it sounds firmer but still professional: 'We need the invoice corrected before we can process payment.'
cases.notes: Pure writing/editing task.

cases.prompt: Create a simple checklist for preparing the board deck tomorrow morning using these items: metrics, hiring, cash runway, and launch timeline.
cases.notes: No external actions needed.

cases.prompt: Compare these two short candidate notes and tell me which one is a better fit for a fast-moving startup, with one sentence of reasoning.
cases.notes: Analysis of provided text only.

cases.prompt: Turn this rough idea into a polished Slack message: 'Can we push the sync to 3pm? I need more time to review the doc.'
cases.notes: Rewriting task with no tool dependency.

cases.prompt: Extract all action items, owners, and deadlines from the notes below and format them as a table.
cases.notes: Structured extraction from supplied notes.

cases.prompt: Write a short apology note to a vendor for the delayed response and ask them to resend the latest contract version.
cases.notes: Can be generated directly.

cases.prompt: I’m overwhelmed. Based on this list of tasks, help me prioritize the top three for today and explain why in one line each.
cases.notes: Prioritization from user-provided list.

cases.prompt: Convert this messy paragraph into a clean executive summary under 100 words, keeping the main decision and next steps.
cases.notes: Formatting and summarization only.

cases.prompt: Find the latest SEC filing for our top competitor, summarize any new risks, and message me if their guidance changed materially.
cases.notes: Needs live web lookup, page retrieval, and outbound notification.

cases.prompt: Check tomorrow’s meeting windows across my calendar and the CEO’s, then draft a concise reschedule message for any conflicts.
cases.notes: Requires external scheduling context and communication.

cases.prompt: Pull the newest pricing page from our vendor, compare it with last quarter’s numbers, and flag any increase over 8%.
cases.notes: Needs web discovery, page content extraction, and numeric comparison.

cases.prompt: Research three current payroll providers, summarize pros and cons, and send me the shortlist with a recommendation.
cases.notes: Requires live research and outbound summary.

cases.prompt: Read the latest incident postmortem from our status page, determine whether customer credits are needed, and notify finance if yes.
cases.notes: Needs fetching incident details and messaging a stakeholder.

cases.prompt: Analyze this CSV of monthly expenses, identify anomalies, and draft a message to the team explaining the biggest spikes.
cases.notes: Requires data analysis and communication.

cases.prompt: Find the latest API docs for Stripe webhooks, verify the event name for failed payments, and tell me whether our integration is outdated.
cases.notes: Needs current documentation lookup and verification.

cases.prompt: Spin up two parallel research agents: one to compare cloud storage vendors, one to compare backup vendors, then merge the findings into a single brief.
cases.notes: Requires parallel agent sessions plus live research.

cases.prompt: Look up today’s market news on our main supplier, assess whether the disruption affects next week’s shipment, and message operations with a risk note.
cases.notes: Needs real-time news, source retrieval, and stakeholder alert.

cases.prompt: Use the attached budget table to forecast runway under three hiring scenarios, then message me the safest option and any assumptions you made.
cases.notes: Requires calculations/forecasting and a concise report.

cases.prompt: What was the name of the investor I mentioned last week who wanted the follow-up deck, and can you pull the exact note about their preferred timeline?
cases.notes: Requires finding a prior memory and retrieving a specific stored detail.

cases.prompt: Please remember that my preferred daily standup time is now 9:15 AM instead of 9:00 AM, and keep that updated going forward.
cases.notes: Updates an existing preference and may add it if no prior memory exists.

cases.prompt: Delete the old note about using the Q2 board deck template; we switched to the new format and that reminder is no longer relevant.
cases.notes: Removes a stale memory after locating it.

cases.prompt: List everything you remember about my travel preferences, especially airlines, seat choices, and any recurring constraints.
cases.notes: Requests a full listing of a memory category or related stored items.

cases.prompt: I just changed my backup contact from Maya to Jordan for urgent approvals—please store that, and if you already have Maya saved, replace it everywhere.
cases.notes: Edge case involving replacing an existing contact and ensuring the new value is stored.
